_note: Original setting-specific backgrounds for Open Dungeon Master. Not SRD-derived content. Skills are ids from src/lib/srd/skills.json.

backgrounds.name: Corpo Dropout
backgrounds.blurb: You walked out of a megacorp tower with insider skills, a few secrets, and a target on your back.

backgrounds.name: Street Doc
backgrounds.blurb: You patch up runners in an unlicensed clinic. No questions, credits up front, favors remembered.

backgrounds.name: Fixer's Runner
backgrounds.blurb: You moved packages and secrets for a fixer; half the undercity owes you or is owed by you.

backgrounds.name: Arcology Rat
backgrounds.blurb: You grew up in the maintenance ducts of an arcology and know every vent, camera blind spot, and cargo lift.

backgrounds.name: Chrome Pit Fighter
backgrounds.blurb: You fought augmented brawlers in the cage circuit, and the crowds still chant your handle.

backgrounds.name: Data Courier
backgrounds.blurb: You carried encrypted payloads through hostile grid sectors, sometimes in your own headware.

backgrounds.name: Guild Engineer
backgrounds.blurb: A certified member of the engineers' guild, welcome in any workshop and fluent in blueprints.

backgrounds.name: Airship Deckhand
backgrounds.blurb: You crewed a trade airship, splicing rigging in gales and trading gossip in every port tower.

backgrounds.name: Clockwork Apprentice
backgrounds.blurb: You served a master artificer, winding automata and learning which gears hide the maker's tricks.

backgrounds.name: Union Stoker
backgrounds.blurb: You shoveled coal in the great engine halls, and the laborers' union still counts you as family.

backgrounds.name: Aether Scholar
backgrounds.blurb: You studied the aether sciences at a famous academy and can talk your way into any symposium.

backgrounds.name: Constabulary Inspector
backgrounds.blurb: You walked a beat and closed cases for the city constabulary before turning in your badge.

backgrounds.name: Vault Born
backgrounds.blurb: Raised in a sealed shelter on old-world books and drills, you stepped outside knowing everything but the wasteland.

backgrounds.name: Wasteland Scavenger
backgrounds.blurb: You strip ruins for parts and provisions, and you can tell worthwhile salvage from scrap at a glance.

backgrounds.name: Caravan Guard
backgrounds.blurb: You escorted traders between settlements, and every waystation on the route knows your face.

backgrounds.name: Cult Escapee
backgrounds.blurb: You fled a doomsday congregation and can still recite its liturgy well enough to pass as faithful.

backgrounds.name: Rad-Zone Guide
backgrounds.blurb: You lead travelers through glowing craters and storm fronts, reading hazards the way sailors read weather.

backgrounds.name: Settlement Medic
backgrounds.blurb: You kept a settlement alive with scavenged medicine and steady hands when the raiders came.

backgrounds.name: Grave Digger
backgrounds.blurb: You tend the churchyard and its dead, and you know which graves are best left undisturbed.

backgrounds.name: Asylum Survivor
backgrounds.blurb: They locked you away for what you claimed to see. You were right, and you learned to read people to get out.

backgrounds.name: Occult Librarian
backgrounds.blurb: You catalogued books that should not exist and remember exactly where the worst ones are shelved.

backgrounds.name: Seance Medium
backgrounds.blurb: You hold sittings for the grieving. Most nights it is theater; some nights something answers.

backgrounds.name: Cursed Bloodline
backgrounds.blurb: Your family name opens doors and ends conversations; everyone has heard what happens to your kin.

backgrounds.name: Night Watchman
backgrounds.blurb: You walked the town's streets after dark with a lantern and a ring of keys, and you noticed things.

backgrounds.name: Private Inquiry Agent
backgrounds.blurb: You take discreet cases for paying clients, and your ledger holds half the town's secrets.

backgrounds.name: Beat Reporter
backgrounds.blurb: You chase stories for the local paper, and a press card opens doors that stay shut to strangers.

backgrounds.name: Reformed Burglar
backgrounds.blurb: You went straight years ago, but you still see every house as a puzzle of latches and sight lines.

backgrounds.name: Courtroom Clerk
backgrounds.blurb: You filed the town's suits and wills for years, and you know where every record is buried.

backgrounds.name: Disgraced Socialite
backgrounds.blurb: Scandal cost you your standing, but you still know the guest lists, the grudges, and the back stairs.

backgrounds.name: Police Informant
backgrounds.blurb: You traded whispers to the law to stay free, and both the precinct and the street think you are theirs.

backgrounds.name: Plague Doctor
backgrounds.blurb: You walked sealed districts in beak and wax, and guards still let your mask through the barricades.

backgrounds.name: Witch Hunter's Ward
backgrounds.blurb: Raised by an order that burns the unclean, you can read their trail signs and their warrants.

backgrounds.name: Penitent Pilgrim
backgrounds.blurb: You walk the old pilgrim roads atoning for something, and keepers of wayside shrines shelter you.

backgrounds.name: Sellsword Deserter
backgrounds.blurb: You abandoned a mercenary company that does not forgive. You know their ways, and they know your name.

backgrounds.name: Crypt Scribe
backgrounds.blurb: You copied epitaphs and funerary rites in the great necropolis, and its wardens still admit you.

backgrounds.name: Beggar Prophet
backgrounds.blurb: You preach doom on street corners, and the desperate who listen bring you rumors and bread.
